code:
import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errs: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errs = [errs..., "empty-name"]
  end
  if age < 0
    errs = [errs..., "negative-age"]
  end
  if age > 150
    errs = [errs..., "too-old"]
  end
  errs
end

fn report(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  let errs = validate(name, age)
  let n = errs.len()
  if n == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    mut joined = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match errs.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        if i == 0
          joined = "#{s}"
        else
          joined = "#{joined},#{s}"
        end
      when None
        joined = joined
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("errors=#{joined}")
  end
end

report("", -5)
report("Alice", 30)
report("Bob", 200)
